reviews.comment:
Bien atendido.  Solo que no había nafta infinia,  pero debido a un fin de semana de buen tiempo,  lo que generó un pico de atención.  El resto 10 puntos

(Translated by Google)
Good service. The only problem was that there was no Infinia gas, due to a weekend of good weather, which generated a surge in service. The rest were 10 points.
